---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.family_map_wall_board
alias: family_map_wall_board
purchased_on: 2026-03-02
total_eur: 36
counterparty: Möbelhaus Malmö AB
project: Family Map Wall
related_entity: Ida Novak
lines:
  - item: pin board
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 29
    line_eur: 29
  - item: colored map pins
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 7
    line_eur: 7
---
# Map wall board and pin set

```text
+----------------+----------------------------+
| field          | value                      |
+----------------+----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                       |
| bill_id        | bill.family_map_wall_board |
| alias          | family_map_wall_board      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-03-02                 |
| total_eur      | 36                         |
| counterparty   | Möbelhaus Malmö AB         |
| project        | Family Map Wall            |
| related_entity | Ida Novak                  |
+----------------+----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item             | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | pin board        | 1   | 29       | 29       |
| 2 | colored map pins | 1   | 7        | 7        |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL            |     |          | 36       |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of those warm household purchases that only becomes part of the story once the map wall gets named.

next_step.current_state: First bill updated successfully. Reactive outbox skill appears inapplicable (finance file, not outbox). Continue OCR migration for remaining Ida-related bills.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by OCR-ing all bills related to Ida Novak. Added YAML frontmatter (bill schema) to 3 matching purchase records while preserving each original body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), read applicable nested AGENTS, used process-next-inbox-item + OCR + migration + finance schema docs, preserved existing note bodies under new frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR bills related to Ida Novak. Search in 50_finance/purchases found 3 matching bill records, each read fully and updated with required bill frontmatter fields (`record_type`, `bill_id`, `alias`, `purchased_on`, `total_eur`, `counterparty`, `project`, `lines`, optional `related_entity`) derived from visible note content. No missing required fields remained, and processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
